indicators.name: no bed or resting surface
indicators.rationale: The absence of a bed or any resting surface makes this space unsuitable for sleep.

indicators.name: no furniture or seating
indicators.rationale: The lack of furniture or seating makes it impossible to sit or lie down.

indicators.name: no windows or curtains
indicators.rationale: No windows or curtains make it impossible to control light and privacy.

indicators.name: no lighting control
indicators.rationale: No lighting control makes it impossible to adjust brightness and color temperature.

reasoning_summary: This indoor scene is completely unsuitable for sleep (primary). There is no bed or resting surface, no furniture or seating, no windows or curtains, and no lighting control, making it impossible to create a comfortable sleep environment.
